title: podman generate systemd for Pods
body:
/kind feature

**Description**

Based on user feedback, it would be nice to support generating service files for Pods.

Cc: @baude @mheon

comments.body: I just wanted to open an issue towards the same goal :) I think in the end it would be really nice if one could get N + 1 service files (n containers & 1 pod) and starting the pod service file would start the pod and then the dependant services. Probably using systemd's template units ala pod.service, pod@container1.service etc…?
My thoughts are basically the same - one service for the overall pod, and then sub-services for containers within the pod.
how would you expect the output? right now, for a container, we simply print the output to stdout. that works fine for a single container.  whats being proposed is multiple files.  thoughts?
Well the pod service file would probably have no output and the individual container service files would have the same setup as now output wise.
we havent had time to do feature work in weeks.
@vrothberg landed this one, I believe. Closing as it is included in latest Podman.
